task: I want to purchase an open-box Samsung Galaxy S25 Plus in excellent condition and trade in a gray Galaxy S20 5G (Verizon), with a perfect screen, in good condition. How much would it cost?
thoughts: It looks like the page scrolled but the search didn't execute properly. Let me try searching again.
It looks like the page scrolled but the search didn't execute properly. Let me try searching again.
It looks like the page scrolled but the search didn't execute properly. Let me try searching again.
I can see the search text is in the box but it didn't navigate to results. Let me click the search button.
I can see search results. I need to find the Samsung Galaxy S25+ specifically. Let me click on the Galaxy S25+ listing.
I can see the Galaxy S25+ 256GB in the results. Let me click on it to view the product page.
I'm on the Galaxy S25+ product page. I need to scroll down to find open-box options. Let me scroll down.
I can see the pricing options but I need to find the open-box option. Let me scroll down more to find it.
I need to scroll down more to find the open-box option, which is typically below the "Add to cart" button on Best Buy.
I don't see an open-box option on this page. Let me scroll back up to check if I missed it near the pricing area.
I don't see an open-box option on this product page. Let me go back to search results and look for open-box filter options.
Let me search specifically for the open-box version.
I'm back on the search results. Let me scroll down in the left sidebar to find a "Condition" filter for open-box items.
I can see the "Condition" filter with an "Open-Box" option. Let me click on it to filter for open-box items.
The Open-Box filter is applied. I can also see a "Samsung Galaxy S25+" filter suggestion. Let me click on that to narrow down the results further, and wait for results to load.
I found one open-box Samsung Galaxy S25+ result. Let me click on it to see the pricing details.
I can see the open-box Galaxy S25+ page. I need to select the "Excellent" condition. Let me scroll down to see the condition options.
I can see the Open-Box Condition options. Currently "Good" is selected. Let me click "Excellent" to see that price.
A trade-in dialog appeared. Let me first close this to check the "Excellent" open-box price, then return to the trade-in. Let me close the dialog.

I can now see both open-box conditions:
- **Excellent**: $897.99
- **Good**: $867.99

Let me click on "Excellent" to select it, then check the trade-in value.
The Open-Box Excellent price is **$897.99**. Now I need to check the trade-in value for a Galaxy S20 5G. Let me click on "Check your trade-in value."
The trade-in dialog is open. I need to select Samsung as the brand. Let me click the dropdown.
I can see the brand dropdown with Samsung at the bottom. Let me select it.
Samsung is selected. I'll use "Guided Search" to find the Galaxy S20 5G.
I'm on the Guided Search tab. Let me select the Model Family dropdown to find Galaxy S20.
I can see the dropdown list. I need to scroll down to find the Galaxy S20 5G. Let me scroll within this dropdown.
I need to scroll up in the dropdown since the S20 should be before S21. Let me scroll up in the dropdown list.
I don't see Galaxy S20 5G yet. Let me scroll down further in the dropdown to find it.
I can see S21-S23 models. Let me scroll down more to find the S20 5G or check if it appears later.
Let me continue scrolling to see if S20 5G appears later in the list.
Let me continue scrolling to see if S20 5G appears later.
The Galaxy S20 5G doesn't appear in the trade-in list for this product. Let me close this dialog and try Best Buy's standalone trade-in estimator to find the value.
Good, the Open-Box Excellent price is confirmed at $897.99. Now let me navigate to Best Buy's trade-in page to check the Galaxy S20 5G trade-in value.
I'm on the Best Buy Trade-In page. Let me search for the Galaxy S20 5G.

I'm on the Best Buy Trade-In page. Let me search for the Galaxy S20 5G.
Results are loaded but showing S25+ models first. Let me filter by Samsung and scroll down to find the Galaxy S20 5G.
Let me scroll down through the results to find the Galaxy S20 5G.
I see a "Model Family" filter in the left sidebar. Let me scroll down to find Galaxy S20 in the model family filter.
